ReleaseNotes:
🔧 Password Bug Fix - Critical Update

🐛 Bug Fixes:
• Fixed password caching issue - password now properly clears when selecting new PDF files
• Ensures new passwords are used for each encryption operation
• Prevents old passwords from being applied to new files

✨ Features:
• Orange button styling with green hover effects
• Custom tab navigation (no TabControl issues)
• Fixed Select All and Delete Selected functionality
• No admin elevation required
• Framework-dependent design for better compatibility

🎯 Design:
• All buttons orange (#FF8C00) with green hover (#00FF00)
• Square button design (120x50px) with rounded corners
• Dark blue theme maintained throughout
• Consistent visual styling

📦 Installation:
• New users: Download PDFEncryptorSetup.exe
• Existing users: Use auto-update or manual update package
